title: Rich Man's Folly

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Listen close, all people of the earth
From kings to common folk, hear this truth
No fortune can purchase one more breath
When death comes calling, gold has no use

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Money can't buy tomorrow
Riches fade like morning frost
All the wealth this world can offer
Can't redeem a single soul that's lost

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: See the proud ones building mighty towers
Their names inscribed on marble walls
But their glory's just a fading flower
Time will claim it, watch it fall

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Money can't buy tomorrow
Riches fade like morning frost
All the wealth this world can offer
Can't redeem a single soul that's lost

sections.label: Bridge
lines: The wise and foolish share one fate
The grave accepts no golden key
But hope remains beyond death's gate
For those whose treasure God will keep

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: So don't lose heart when others rise
Their mansions gleaming in the sun
Like shadows in the evening sky
They'll fade when day is done

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Money can't buy tomorrow
Riches fade like morning frost
All the wealth this world can offer
Can't redeem a single soul that's lost
Place your trust in what endures
Beyond the markets' rise and fall
For only love and truth are sure
When time has claimed it all

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Money can't buy tomorrow
Riches fade like morning frost
All the wealth this world can offer
Can't redeem a single soul that's lost

epigraph: and boast themselves in the multitude of their riches
